full_title: Global wheat disease identification via AI technologies: An in-depth survey with sustainability and future projections

search_string_given: Partial (Boolean fragment: identification OR Vision system OR Robotics)
records_at_each_stage: 1543 identified -> 575 after dedup/auto-exclude -> 382 after title/keyword screen -> 315 sought -> 191 assessed -> 175 included
reproducibility_verdict: Partly documented (databases + numeric flow given; full Boolean string and exclusion reasons not fully itemized)

figure_types: Conceptual/framework(1); taxonomy(1); PRISMA flow(1); bibliometric/trend plots(6+); sample/device images(1); comparison charts(4)
table_types: Dataset tables; method/performance comparison tables; large multi-row synthesis tables (disease-model-outcome-reference)
